owners: kernel sandbox runtime service composed from ports
invariants: Main JVM must not execute arbitrary sandbox code; network defaults to deny; artifacts are prompt-visible only after scan and non-secret classification
compatBoundary: No Web/JDBC/starter changes in this slice; no workflow engine; no remote mesh; existing connector and credential behavior unchanged
nonGoals: Local shell, browser automation, code interpreter implementation, persistence, Web API, and Audit Ledger integration
